channel.title: LLM on Xu Zhang's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in LLM on Xu Zhang's Blog

item.title: Automated clinical coding using off-the-shelf large language models
item.description: NIPS Workshop 2023 Automated clinical coding using off-the-shelf large language models | OpenReview Model: Llama-2, GPT-3.5 and GPT-4 Dataset: CodiEsp (1000cases) Metrics: macro-F1 micro-F1 Proposed(LLM inference) 0.225 0.157 PLM-ICD(BERT based, pretrained on MIMIC III & VI, SOTA) 0.216 0.219 Prompt：“You are a clinical coder, consider the case note and assign the appropriate ICD codes” LLM控温：GPT设为0，Llama设为0.001（最小值），以获得确定性输出。 后处理：将LLM生成的文本与ICD code description进行贪婪匹配。 StefanoTrv/simple_icd_10_CM: A simple python library for ICD-10-CM codes (github.com) JoakimEdin/medical-coding-reproducibility (github.com) 直接匹配代码/匹配代码描述/树形搜索的对比
